channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Trying to make sense of a devastating, sudden end to the Detroit Lions' dream season
item.description: The end of the Detroit Lions' dream season was heartbreaking and sudden. Now we're left trying to make sense of this missed opportunity.
item.dc:creator: Derick Hutchinson, Local 4

item.title: Speaking of ‘Unstoppable’: We love these inspiring sports movies
item.description: From 'Hoosiers' to 'A League of Their Own,' you can watch these 12 classic and inspiring sports films at home.
item.dc:creator: Randy Myers, The Mercury News

item.title: Timberwolves' Donte DiVincenzo out indefinitely with toe injury
item.description: MEMPHIS, Tenn. (AP) — Donte DiVincenzo, who recently moved into the Minnesota Timberwolves starting lineup, is out indefinitely with a big toe injury, the team announced before Monday's game against the Memphis Grizzlies.
item.dc:creator: CLAY BAILEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Auburn a unanimous No. 1, Duke now No. 2; Michigan St into top 10, Louisville ends AP Top 25 drought
item.description: A wild week of upsets and court stormings led to a massive shakeup in the AP Top 25. One constant: Auburn. The Tigers were the unanimous pick at No.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Anthony Santander agrees to a 5-year deal with the Toronto Blue Jays, AP source says
item.description: The Toronto Blue Jays have landed a high-profile free agent, adding Anthony Santander to their powerful lineup, according to a person with direct knowledge of the agreement.
item.dc:creator: Jay Cohen, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: The 1 play that turned tide against Detroit Lions in playoff loss, according to Dan Campbell
item.description: There was one play in particular that turned the tide against the Detroit Lions in their playoff loss to the Commanders, according to Dan Campbell.
item.dc:creator: Derick Hutchinson, Local 4

item.title: Spurs, Pacers make their way to Paris, for a week where all eyes will be on Victor Wembanyama
item.description: NANTERRE, France (AP) — Officially, Indiana will be the home team on the scoreboard when it plays San Antonio in Paris on Thursday. The Pacers know better. They will not be feeling right at home. “It’s going to be a big crowd against us, honestly,” Indiana guard Andrew Nembhard said.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Ravens' Mark Andrews faces scrutiny after two crucial mistakes in playoff loss to Bills
item.description: Baltimore Ravens tight end Mark Andrews faced tremendous scrutiny on social media on Sunday night after the team dropped the divisional round game to the Buffalo Bills.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Novak Djokovic gets his apologies and is ready to focus on Carlos Alcaraz at the Australian Open
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Novak Djokovic got the mea culpas he wanted from the Australian Open's local broadcaster and its employee who insulted him on the air and so, according to tournament organizers, the 24-time Grand Slam champion is ready to concentrate on his quarterfinal showdown with Carl
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Josh Allen scores 2 TDs, Bills force 3 turnovers to beat Ravens 27-25 and reach AFC title game
item.description: The Bills closed their season a perfect 10-0 at home, including a 30-21 win over the previously unbeaten Chiefs in Week 11.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Jeff Torborg, former big league catcher and manager, dies at 83
item.description: Jeff Torborg, the former catcher who caught Sandy Koufax's perfect game and was the 1990 AL manager of the year with the Chicago White Sox, died Sunday. He was 83.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: CMU Softball ready to chase another dominant season in 2025
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— After a record-breaking 2024 campaign that ended in postseason disappointment, the Colorado Mesa University softball team is gearing up for another dominant season.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Elina Svitolina rallies to reach the Australian Open quarterfinals for the third time
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Elina Svitolina rallied from 4-1 down and took 11 of the next 12 games in a 6-4, 6-1 victory over Veronika Kudermetova on Monday to reach the Australian Open quarterfinals for the third time.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Barkley runs for 78- and 62-yard TDs in the snow and Eagles top Rams 28-22 to head to NFC title game
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Saquon Barkley blew through a hole and ran untouched in the wintry mix, the Eagles' 2,000-yard rusher smacking his helmet with his hand on his final snowy steps of a 78-yard touchdown run.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jeff Torborg, World Series champ and former MLB manager, dead at 83
item.description: Jeff Torborg, a former MLB catcher and manager, has died, the Chicago White Sox announced on Sunday. The 83-year-old played 10 seasons in the majors and managed 11 more.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump 'embodies what being an American is all about,' UFC's Dana White says
item.description: UFC President Dana White spoke glowingly about President-elect Trump on Sunday ahead of Inauguration Day in Washington. White and Trump are longtime friends.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Brittany Mahomes stuns fans with Chiefs playoff game appearance days after giving birth
item.description: Brittany Mahomes, the wife of Kansas City Chiefs star Patrick Mahomes, was praised for showing up at the team's playoff game days after giving birth.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Coco Gauff pays tribute to TikTok at Australian Open, sees silver lining
item.description: American tennis star Coco Gauff paid tribute to TikTok as the ban in the United States went into effect late Saturday night. The app may come back.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Blackhawks take losing streak into game against the Golden Knights
item.description: Vegas Golden Knights (29-13-3, in the Pacific Division) vs. Chicago Blackhawks (14-28-3, in the Central Division) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Ball and Bridges lead Hornets to wild 125-123 win over Bulls
item.description: LaMelo Ball scored 26 points, Miles Bridges had 21 and the Charlotte Hornets held on for a wild 125-123 win over the Chicago Bulls on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Chiefs fans banking on three-peat during Wild Card Weekend
item.description: The NFL playoffs kicked off on Saturday, but the Kansas City Chiefs have to wait another week for their playoff campaign to start. It’s leaving fans with mixed feelings.
item.dc:creator: Jacob Sloan, NewsNation

item.title: Australian Open 2025: How to watch on TV, betting odds and more to know
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Get caught up on the Australian Open with a guide that tells you everything you need to know about how to watch the year’s first Grand Slam tennis tournament, what the betting odds are, what the schedule is and more: How to watch the Australian Open on TV — In the
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utah Valley wins on overtime buzzer-beater, 85-83
item.description: ARLINGTON, Tex. (ABC4 Sports) - Texas native Kylin Green went the full length of the floor in five seconds and dished to Jackson Holcombe, who scored in the final second of overtime to lift Utah Valley to a thrilling 85-83 road victory over UT Arlington on Thursday night at College Park Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bob Uecker, colorful comedian and Baseball Hall of Famer, dies
item.description: From his time as a backup catcher to appearances on Johnny Carson's late night show to his more than five decades in the broadcast booth, people far and wide knew Bob Uecker.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, KRON4

item.title: March Madness will pay women's teams under a new structure approved by the NCAA
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Women's basketball teams finally will be paid for playing games in the NCAA Tournament each March just like the men have for years under a plan approved Wednesday at the NCAA convention.
item.dc:creator: TERESA M. WALKER, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Beck hopes to bring big play ability to Utes offense
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - When Kyle Whittingham called former BYU quarterback Jason Beck about becoming the Utes new offensive coordinator, Beck jumped at the chance. "When I hit that time of year and had some opportunities come up, and and Coach Witt came calling," Beck said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Connor Ingram returns for Utah Hockey Club
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club began a seven-game homestand last week by winning just one of three games. But they still have four games left at the Delta Center beginning Tuesday night against Montreal.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Patrick Fishburn nearly wins first PGA Tour event
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Former BYU star Patrick Fishburn had visions of winning his first PGA Tour event. He was leading after two rounds, and one shot back after three rounds before ending up tied for sixth.
item.dc:creator: Wesley Ruff, ABC 4

item.title: Young Broncos should be proud of 10-win season
item.description: No one will ever be thrilled about losing a playoff game by 24 points, and the Broncos certainly aren't, but it's incredible how greatly Denver exceeded expectations this season.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: The Athletic's Dianna Russini provides a look inside the Bears search for their next head coach
item.description: The Chicago Bears have requested interviews with 19 candidates for their next head coach, including Mike McCarthy, Thomas Brown, Ron Rivera, Ben Johnson, Todd Monken, and Steve Sarkisian, while the ambiguity around Ryan Poles' contract situation may make it more difficult for the Bears to hire their
item.dc:creator: Jarrett Payton, WGN 9

item.title: Cubs sign former Brewers starting pitcher to one-year deal
item.description: The Chicago Cubs have signed former Milwaukee Brewers starting pitcher Colin Rea to a new contract for the 2025 MLB season, while the Cubs have designated RHP Michael Arias for assignment to make room for Rea on the 40-man roster.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
